name: Turkey Jalapeño Sausage Reuben
recipeIngredient: 3 Jalapeño chile peppers, seeded and finely diced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet, place the bacon fat and heat it on medium until hot.
2. Add the onions and garlic, and sauté them for 4 to 5 minutes, or until the onions are tender. Let the vegetables cool, then purée them.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the jalapeño chile peppers, bread crumbs, milk, salt, and puréed onions until well blended.
4. In a medium bowl, whisk together the egg, egg white, and heavy cream.
5. Add the oil and ground turkey to the egg mixture; mix with your hands until combined. Stir in the cilantro.
6. Form the meat mixture into 8 patties that are about the size of the bread slices.
7. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
8. Place the patties in a baking pan and bake for 10 minutes on each side, or until firm.
9. On each slice of bread, place a slice of cheese and tomato.
10. Under a preheated broiler, toast the bread slices until the cheese has melted.
11. Place one baked sausage patty on top of each toasted bread piece.
12. Top with Southwestern Slaw and serve Black Bean Relish on the side.
